scope: monthly contribution cycle creation from active plans
report-due marking for confirmed cycles based on strategy cadence
ContributionCycle report recommendation schema fields and migrations
jobs repository user and portfolio scoping safeguards
Postgres-backed jobs tests and deterministic pagination regression fixture
residualRisk: Approved with risk: the independent reviewer found no blocking issues and flagged only that the pagination regression fixture used random UUID ordering. That fixture was then hardened with deterministic ordered UUIDs and the API test suite was rerun successfully. Remaining deterministic signals are accepted as bounded job names, Prisma enum/status constants, DTO/test vocabulary, and dependency-lockfile changes required by pg-boss.
